headlines.title_cn: China’s open-weights AI strategy is winning
headlines.title_en: China’s open-weights AI strategy is winning

headlines.title_cn: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
headlines.title_en: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
headlines.summary_cn: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.
headlines.summary_en: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

headlines.title_cn: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
headlines.title_en: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
headlines.summary_cn: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is one of the basic building blocks of AI interoperability, giving AI models a secure way to access external data sources and services. It’s the plumbing that lets a chatbot reach into your calendar, your database, or your internal tools, instead of engineers building custom pipes for every connection. Next […]
headlines.summary_en: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is one of the basic building blocks of AI interoperability, giving AI models a secure way to access external data sources and services. It’s the plumbing that lets a chatbot reach into your calendar, your database, or your internal tools, instead of engineers building custom pipes for every connection. Next […]

headlines.title_cn: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
headlines.title_en: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
headlines.summary_cn: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.
headlines.summary_en: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

items.title_cn: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
items.title_en: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
items.summary_cn: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.
items.summary_en: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.
